ItacPersonItem.Notes: For a short biographical account see Antonino Mongitore, Bibliotheca Sicula, Didaci Bua, Palermo, Vol.I, pp. 329-330 (BL Shelfmark:610.m.10.); Francesco Ferrara, Storia di Catania, Catania, 1829 (BL Shelfmark:General Reference Collection SFX lsidyv363f3ec8)
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
